title: crataegus azarolus var. triloba
intro: Crataegus azarolus var. triloba, also known as the Azarole or Eastern hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to southeastern Europe and Asia Minor. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Crataegus azarolus var. triloba include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain cardiovascular diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
